title: World Knowledge Reconstruction
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for reconstructing recognizable real-world architecture, interfaces, retail interiors, and cultural spaces from model knowledge rather than loose visual guesses.

en.title: World Knowledge Reconstruction
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for reconstructing recognizable real-world architecture, interfaces, retail interiors, and cultural spaces from model knowledge rather than loose visual guesses.

zh-CN.title: World Knowledge 场景还原
zh-CN.description: 测试真实品牌、建筑、系统界面和文化空间的知识还原能力: 重点不是泛化风格,而是让细节像模型真的知道现实世界。
